(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('874096ba-6e93-490e-a697-becf3505685e', 'Which choice best states the main idea of the passage?', 'Passage 4: Scientists observed that species in region 4 adapt quickly when temperatures shift by even a few degrees.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"Local species can adapt when temperatures change slightly","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Supported by the passage."},{"id":"B","text":"Temperature never affects species","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage lists every species on Earth","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too broad."},{"id":"D","text":"Scientists refuse to study climate","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Not stated."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage focuses on quick adaptation to small temperature shifts.', NULL, 'Expression of Ideas', 'Rhetorical Synthesis', 'reading_writing', 'expression', 'SYN', NULL, 'hard', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

VALUES ('c6419c37-e3bd-4ab4-8519-2e99002500e2', 'Which choice best states the main idea of the passage?', 'Passage 10: Scientists observed that species in region 10 adapt quickly when temperatures shift by even a few degrees.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"Local species can adapt when temperatures change slightly","is_correct":true,"explanation":"Supported by the passage."},{"id":"B","text":"Temperature never affects species","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Contradicted."},{"id":"C","text":"The passage lists every species on Earth","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Too broad."},{"id":"D","text":"Scientists refuse to study climate","is_correct":false,"explanation":"Not stated."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage focuses on quick adaptation to small temperature shifts.', NULL, 'Information and Ideas', 'Command of Evidence', 'reading_writing', 'information', 'COE', NULL, 'medium', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_template_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
